title: ATi Structures
description: Custom vanilla dungeons and structures for both Fabric and Forge
body: --- ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9e90920ef697682d308499d37d5fc2e6d39f407_0.webp) **ATi Structures** adds **56 handcrafted fantasy and medieval structures** to your Minecraft world. These structures can appear both **above and below ground**, all built using *vanilla features only* **no custom blocks or entities included**! (FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK) ----- _THIS VERSION INCLUDES CUSTOM ITEMS AND MODIFIED MOBS_ ----- --- ![News](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebdb32cc8e99af2340ef430a3c057bb6676ee23a_0.webp) - 🆕 7 new structures - 🌍 Added **Terralith** compatibility + other terrain mod support - 🛠 Major changes to structure generation *(no more floaters!)* - ⚖ Improved structure distribution for better world spawn - 🎁 Rebalanced loot tables --- ![Future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d87528ec57d714c9e9b5f98237d56e8bdd59f9_0.webp) A new series of mods is currently in development. An updated version of the Vanilla Edition is planned, but not the priority right now. --- ![Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b35fdac48d30e5f8f2c14532d16959440002c5e_0.webp) - ✅ Fully compatible with **Terralith** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Geophilic** - ✅ Fully compatible with **JJ Thunder to the Max** - ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld** - ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Biomes O' Plenty** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** --- [![Join the Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370b72768ac048862cb8fb192e72d2d9440864e9.jpeg)](https://discord.gg/T4xFVm8kct) [![Support us on Kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad411dc836beeeb4960d34dc09869d7e82d03f9_0.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/atii1)
